findings.title: No subcontractor invoice routes exist
findings.description: Full subcontractor invoicing workflow missing. Procore has dedicated list with 5 filters (billing_period, contract_company, payment_status, invoice_status, contract_type), status bar (NOT INVITED, INVITED, UNDER REVIEW, APPROVED, REVISE AND RESUBMIT), ERP Status column, and bulk actions. No routes exist under /api/projects/[projectId]/invoicing/subcontractor. Frontend tab marked 'coming soon'.

findings.title: No owner invoice line items CRUD endpoints
findings.description: No endpoints to create, update, or delete individual line items. InvoiceLineItemsTable is read-only with hardcoded 5% retention. Without line item CRUD, invoices always show $0 totals. The Procore AIA G702/G703 workflow is entirely built around editing SOV line items per invoice.

findings.title: Broken FK join in owner invoice GET/PATCH/DELETE — uses 'contracts' not 'prime_contracts'
findings.description: Owner invoice routes join using 'contracts!inner(project_id)' but owner_invoices.prime_contract_id points to 'prime_contracts' table. All GET, PATCH, DELETE, submit, and approve operations on individual invoices will fail with a Supabase relation error in production.

findings.title: commitments/[id]/invoices POST inserts with wrong FK column name
findings.description: POST handler inserts into owner_invoices using 'contract_id: parseInt(id)' but schema uses 'prime_contract_id' (UUID). Insert will fail or produce NULL FK. Also semantically wrong — passing commitment UUID as prime contract ID.

findings.title: No REVISE AND RESUBMIT status transition endpoint
findings.description: Procore has 'REVISE AND RESUBMIT' as first-class transition from UNDER REVIEW. No endpoint exists for this. Current PATCH blocks all non-draft edits so it cannot be used for status-only transitions.

findings.title: No billing period update, close, or delete endpoints
findings.description: Billing periods route only supports GET (list) and POST (create). No PATCH/DELETE. Cannot close a billing period — a key Procore workflow gate. billing_periods.status enum (open/closed/approved) and is_active cannot be changed via API.

findings.title: Billing periods route targets wrong table — contract_billing_periods instead of billing_periods
findings.description: Route queries contract_billing_periods (per-contract sub-period table) instead of billing_periods (project-level table linked by project_id). Billing Periods tab will show wrong data.

findings.title: No invoice attachments endpoints
findings.description: PO invoices manifest shows Attachments column. No attachment routes for owner invoices or commitment invoices. All other modules have dedicated attachment routes.

findings.title: Owner invoice list GET has no query-param filters
findings.description: GET /api/projects/[projectId]/invoicing/owner returns all invoices without filter params. Procore specifies Billing Period and Prime Contract filters. Frontend does client-side filtering on full result set — performance issue for any real project.

findings.title: No 'paid' status transition endpoint
findings.description: Owner invoice workflow includes 'paid' status. No endpoint to mark invoice as paid, record payment date, or track payment amount. PATCH blocks non-draft edits. Payment tracking is a placeholder (total_paid: 0).

findings.title: No invoicing export endpoint
findings.description: Procore subcontractor list has Export dropdown. No export route for invoicing data (no PDF, no Excel/CSV). Other modules have dedicated export routes.

findings.title: Commitment invoices endpoint returns SOV summary not discrete invoice records
findings.description: GET /api/commitments/[id]/invoices returns SOV billing summary from subcontract_sov_items/purchase_order_sov_items. Procore models PO invoices as discrete 'Invoices (Requisitions)' with 15 columns. No endpoints to create/list/update/delete individual commitment invoice records.

findings.title: PATCH blocks all non-draft edits — prevents REVISE AND RESUBMIT editing
findings.description: PATCH returns HTTP 400 for any non-draft invoice. In Procore's workflow, invoices in REVISE AND RESUBMIT status must be editable. A nuanced rule is needed to allow edits in that state.

findings.title: Legacy /api/invoices route targets Acumatica ERP table not app invoices
findings.description: GET/POST /api/invoices queries acumatica_ar_invoices. Creates a conflicting data model. Should be retired or clearly marked ERP-only.

findings.title: No project-level billing_periods table routes — Billing Periods tab unbuildable
findings.description: No routes target the billing_periods table (project-level). Cannot build the Billing Periods tab without this. billing_periods has project_id, name, start_date, end_date, status, is_active.

findings.title: Submit and approve routes lack precondition guards
findings.description: Submit does not check that line items exist. Approve does not verify invoice was previously submitted. Both allow status transitions from any current status without guards.

findings.title: No ERP sync status field in owner invoice list response
findings.description: Procore subcontractor list has ERP Status column. Owner invoice list GET response does not include erp_status field. No join to acumatica_ar_invoices to indicate sync status.
